title: Wàllug Internet bu IATF
summary: Wàllug jëfandikukat bu International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: IATF soxla woon na ab kër gu dëgër, buy leeral misaal bi, téere ay jëfekaay, te xamal ay jëfandikukat li ñu war a jëfandikoo.
why: Wàll wi mooy buntu IATF bi. Dañu ko tabax ni pexe bu tuuti ngir mu yomb a jàng, di ko tekki, ak di ko toppatoo ci mbind mi.
scopeIn: Jëfandikukat bu askan wi ci jëfi IATF yu ñu nangu, yu jëfandikoo, ak yu ñu denc, yu ànd ak taxawaay, toppatoo, dencukaay, ak firndeel
Jëfandikukat bu jël laaj ak jëfekaay
Jëfandikoo ci làkku angale ak jëfekaay bu ñu waajal ngir tekki
Jëfandikoo Static ci Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Réewi ay jëfandikukat yu ñuul yi, ay xët yi, walla jëfandikukaay yi
Jëfandikukat bu njëkk bi, bi nekk ci dencukaay bu nekk
Waxtaan ci jamono ju sax, ci Discord
Jëfandikukat bu jëfandikukat bii di Sénégal

title: Selfie ci IATF
summary: Jëfandikukat bu njëkk bu IATF, ñu denc ko bi mu àggee ci ab toxalukaay bu am solo.
problem: Jëfekaay bu njëkk ci jumtukaay bu dëppoo ak wàll-wàll ci wàllug IATF.
why: Jëfandikukat bi dañu koy denc ngir ñépp a xam li ñuy def ci liggéey bi, sax su fekkee ne li ñuy jëfandikoo ci moom dakkal na.
scopeIn: Jëfandikukat bu njëkk bu jëfandikoo jumtukaay bu dëppoo ak wàll-wàll
scopeOut: Jëfekaay bu am solo walla jëfandikoo jëfandikukat
Jëfekaay bi ñu dénk ngir jëfandikoo ci liggéey bi

title: Jëfandikukat IATF
summary: Bot bu mbootaayu IATF, archived after reaching a natural stopping point.
problem: Jëfandikukat bi ci wàllug IATF community channels.
why: Jëfandikukat bi dañu koy denc ngir ñépp a xam li ñuy def ci liggéey bi, sax su fekkee ne li ñuy jëfandikoo ci moom dakkal na.
scopeIn: Automatisation de la discorde autour des canaux communautaires de l'IATF, tenue comme un dossier public
scopeOut: Jëfekaay bu am solo walla jëfandikoo jëfandikukat
Jëfekaay bi ñu dénk ngir jëfandikoo ci liggéey bi
